description: MapLibre 5 crashes when paint object is empty {}
resolution: Use PAINT_DEFAULTS fallback — never pass empty paint to addLayer

description: Terra Draw finish event signature is (id: string|number) not (ids[]) — must use getSnapshotFeature(id) then removeFeatures([id])

name: Mixed geometry sublayers
description: Layers with mixed geometry types need 3 sublayers always (Fill+Line+Circle) — no getMaplibreType switch. GeoJSON source setData() must be called directly after loadLayerData to bypass svelte-maplibre-gl firstRun guard

name: deck.gl overlay
description: deck.gl 9 + MapLibre 5: MapboxOverlay({ interleaved: false }) for separate canvas. Add via map.addControl(o as unknown as Parameters<MapLibreMap['addControl']>[0]). Two $effects: overlay lifecycle + setProps({ layers }) sync. DeckGLOverlay.svelte is renderless.

title: TerraDrawMapLibreGLAdapter without lib param
rationale: terra-draw >=1.3 removed the lib parameter from the adapter constructor — only pass { map }

name: annotation-badge-indicators
description: Feature annotation badges: compute centroid of annotated features, render as GeoJSONSource with CircleLayer (amber circle) + SymbolLayer (count label). Highlight annotated features with LineLayer using ['in', ['to-string', ['id']], ['literal', ids]] filter inside same GeoJSONSource.

name: interaction-state-union
description: MapEditor interaction modes use a discriminated union (InteractionState) instead of independent boolean/nullable flags. States: idle, featureSelected, drawRegion, pickFeature, pendingMeasurement. Transitions are atomic — assign a new variant instead of clearing multiple flags. Effects guard state changes with type checks to avoid clobbering unrelated modes.

name: hot-overlay-rendering
description: Hot overlay for large vector tile layers: MapCanvas renders GeoJSON sources (hot-overlay-{layerId}) with Fill+Line+Circle sublayers for features in hotOverlay.getCollection(). DrawingToolbar adds features on upsert success and removes on undo. MapEditor clears all hot features on unmount.
